steps.title: Identify the point values
steps.content: Each draw earns 1 point, so $d$ draws contribute $1 \cdot d = d$ points. Each win earns 3 points, so $w$ wins contribute $3w$ points.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices
steps.content:
• A: $\frac{d}{3} + w = 21$ — This assigns 3 points per draw and 1 point per win, reversing the point values. Eliminated.
  • B: $d + \frac{w}{3} = 21$ — This divides wins by 3 instead of multiplying, giving $\frac{1}{3}$ point per win. Eliminated.
  • C: $d + w = 21$ — This treats every game as worth 1 point regardless of draw or win. Eliminated.
  • D: $d + 3w = 21$ — 1 point per draw plus 3 points per win equals 21. D is correct.
